title: Smoke
purpose: `tests/smoke.vit` is a validation module inside the `tests` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Stdlib-focused smoke and integration validation surfaces.
use_cases: A smoke file should prove the library can still be loaded and exercised through its intended public paths.
